name: Zoho
description: Access CRM, Mail, Calendar, Desk, Books, Projects, WorkDrive, and 30+ Zoho apps through AI chat. Powered by Zoho's official MCP platform.
user_auth_instructions: Your organization admin has already connected Zoho. No additional setup is required.
setup_notes:
Uses Zoho's official MCP platform (zoho.com/mcp).

Admin setup:
1. Go to https://www.zoho.com/mcp/ and sign in with your Zoho admin account
2. Configure an MCP server for the Zoho services you need
   (CRM, Mail, Calendar, Desk, Books, Projects, etc.)
3. Go to the Connect tab and copy your unique MCP Server URL
4. Paste the URL into the Server URL field above
5. Configure OAuth credentials if required by your chosen services

Supported services include: CRM, Mail, Calendar, Desk, Books,
Billing, Inventory, Projects, WorkDrive, Cliq, Recruit, and many more.
See https://www.zoho.com/mcp/services/zoho-services.html for the full list.

Note: Zoho has regional data centers. Use the appropriate domain:
- US: zoho.com
- EU: zoho.eu
- India: zoho.in
- Australia: zoho.com.au
- Japan: zoho.jp
- Canada: zohocloud.ca
